entries.label: H200-Class GPU (Flight-Proven Analog)
entries.performance_basis_note: Based on published H200 SXM datasheet values; not a qualified space part. Thermal performance derived from terrestrial immersion/cold-plate literature.
entries.thermal_basis_note: Cold-plate delta-T assumed ~15 K at full load; TIM resistance included in package-temp budget. Space radiation hardening not characterized.
entries.packaging_notes: SXM form factor; requires custom carrier board for spacecraft integration.

entries.label: Next-Gen GPU Placeholder (Speculative)
entries.performance_basis_note: Placeholder extrapolation from roadmap projections. No confirmed product. Research required before use in any engineering trade.
entries.thermal_basis_note: Double-sided cold plate assumed; actual thermal resistance unknown. All values are research-required estimates.
entries.packaging_notes: Form factor and pinout not defined. Custom integration assumed.

entries.label: High-Heat ASIC Class (Qualified Estimate)
entries.performance_basis_note: Representative of radiation-hardened ASIC class used in defense/space programs. Values are qualified estimates from open literature; specific parts vary.
entries.thermal_basis_note: Cold-plate pickup assumed. Junction-to-case resistance from JEDEC-style characterization; case-to-cold-plate varies with TIM selection.
entries.packaging_notes: Hermetic ceramic or plastic flatpack variants. Mass estimate for ceramic package.

entries.label: Custom Device (Operator-Specified)
entries.performance_basis_note: All values must be specified by operator.
entries.thermal_basis_note: All values must be specified by operator.
